Est. 2009 • Excellence in Pharmaceutical Education

Krishnarpit
Institute

of Pharmacy

Shaping the future of healthcare through knowledge, innovation & integrity — from A to Z.

22+ Years of Excellence
5000+ KIT Worldwide
100% Placement Support
NAAC Accredited
Discover
Who We Are

A Legacy of Pharmaceutical Excellence

Krishnarpit Institute of Pharmacy stands as a beacon of pharmaceutical education, blending rigorous academic tradition with cutting-edge research. Our institution nurtures compassionate pharmacists and scientists who serve society with skill and integrity.

Founded on the principles of knowledge, service, and innovation, KGIP has trained thousands of healthcare professionals who are making a difference across India and the world.

With state-of-the-art laboratories, experienced faculty, and industry partnerships, we offer an education that prepares students not just for careers — but for callings.

🔬
Research
🏛️
Tradition
💊
Innovation
🌍
Global Reach
🎓
Academics
🤝
Integrity
The Complete Spectrum

Pharmacy from A to Z

Every dimension of our institution, every facet of pharmaceutical science

A
⚗️
A — Anatomy
Anatomy & Physiology

The foundation of pharmacy education — deep understanding of the human body, organ systems, and physiological processes that guide drug therapy decisions.

B
🧬
B — Biochemistry
Biochemistry & Molecular Biology

Exploring metabolic pathways, enzyme kinetics, and molecular interactions that form the scientific backbone of modern drug design and discovery.

C
🏥
C — Clinical Pharmacy
Clinical Pharmacy Practice

Bridging the gap between science and patient care through therapeutic drug monitoring, counselling, and pharmacist-led clinical interventions in healthcare settings.

D
💊
D — Drug Discovery
Drug Discovery & Design

From hit identification to lead optimisation — students engage in rational drug design, combinatorial chemistry, and in-silico molecular docking studies.

E
⚖️
E — Ethics
Ethics & Pharmacy Law

Instilling professional responsibility, patient confidentiality, regulatory compliance, and ethical decision-making at every stage of a pharmacist's career.

F
🧪
F — Formulation
Pharmaceutics & Formulation

The art and science of converting active compounds into safe, stable, and effective dosage forms — tablets, capsules, gels, emulsions, and novel drug delivery systems.

G
🏭
G — GMP
Good Manufacturing Practice

Training students in WHO-GMP guidelines, cGMP compliance, quality systems, standard operating procedures, and regulatory frameworks for pharmaceutical production.

H
🏨
H — Hospital Pharmacy
Hospital & Clinical Services

Hands-on hospital internships equip students with real-world experience in dispensing, patient counselling, ward rounds, and medication reconciliation.

I
🏗️
I — Industrial Pharmacy
Industrial Pharmacy

Comprehensive exposure to large-scale manufacturing, process validation, technology transfer, and the pharmaceutical supply chain — from bulk to finished product.

J
📰
J — Journal Club
Journal Club & Research Culture

Weekly scientific discussions, literature reviews, and critical appraisal sessions that cultivate research mindset and evidence-based pharmaceutical practice.

K
🌟
K — Krishnarpit
Krishnarpit — Our Identity

Named with devotion and purpose, Krishnarpit signifies an offering of knowledge to society. Our name is our commitment — education as a sacred service to humanity.

L
🔭
L — Laboratory
State-of-the-Art Laboratories

Our world-class labs — Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Microbiology, and Instrumental Analysis — provide immersive, practical learning experiences.

M
🧲
M — Medicinal Chemistry
Medicinal Chemistry

Structure-activity relationships, synthesis of bioactive compounds, and the chemistry of life-saving molecules form the heart of our medicinal chemistry curriculum.

N
🌿
N — Nutraceuticals
Nutraceuticals & Herbal Science

Integrating traditional wisdom with modern science — students explore phytochemistry, herbal drug standardisation, and the emerging nutraceuticals market.

O
🔮
O — Organic Chemistry
Organic & Pharmaceutical Chemistry

Mastery of reaction mechanisms, stereochemistry, functional group transformations, and synthetic strategies essential for pharmaceutical molecule development.

P
💉
P — Pharmacology
Pharmacology & Toxicology

Understanding drug mechanisms, receptor interactions, dose-response relationships, adverse effects, and the science of how medicines heal — or harm — the body.

Q
✅
Q — Quality Control
Quality Assurance & Control

Rigorous training in analytical testing, validation methods, spectroscopic techniques, and quality management systems that ensure every medicine meets global standards.

R
📡
R — Research
Research & Innovation Hub

Our faculty and students publish in peer-reviewed journals, file patents, and collaborate with industries — driving pharmaceutical innovation that benefits society at large.

S
🛡️
S — Safety
Drug Safety & Pharmacovigilance

Training students in adverse drug reaction monitoring, post-marketing surveillance, and global pharmacovigilance systems that protect patients worldwide.

T
☣️
T — Toxicology
Toxicology & Drug Safety

Comprehensive study of chemical toxicity, antidotes, occupational hazards, forensic toxicology, and risk assessment in pharmaceutical and environmental contexts.

U
🎓
U — University Rankings
University Affiliations & Rankings

Affiliated with leading universities and recognised by PCI, AICTE, and the Ministry of Education — ensuring globally recognised degrees and academic credibility.

V
🦠
V — Vaccines
Vaccinology & Biologics

From immunology fundamentals to mRNA vaccine technology — students explore the cutting edge of biologics, biosimilars, and vaccine development pipelines.

W
🌐
W — WHO Guidelines
WHO & Regulatory Compliance

In-depth curriculum coverage of WHO essential medicines, ICH guidelines, FDA/EMA regulations, and global regulatory pathways for pharmaceutical submissions.

X
🔬
X — X-ray Crystallography
X-ray & Spectroscopic Analysis

Advanced instrumental techniques — XRD, NMR, IR, Mass Spectrometry, HPLC — taught both theoretically and practically for confident pharmaceutical analysis.

Y
📈
Y — Yield Optimisation
Yield & Process Optimisation

Applying design of experiments (DoE), process analytical technology (PAT), and quality by design (QbD) to maximise pharmaceutical manufacturing efficiency.

Z
🏆
Z — Zero Defect
Zero Defect — Our Standard

We uphold a zero-defect culture across teaching, research, and practice. Every graduate leaves as a complete professional — committed to excellence in every dose they dispense.

🎓 How to Apply

Admission Process

Simple step-by-step guide to join Krishnarpit Group of Institute of Pharmacy

01
Check Eligibility

D.Pharm: 10+2 with Science. B.Pharm: 10+2 PCB/PCM (45%+). M.Pharm: B.Pharm degree. Pharm.D: 10+2 PCB (50%+).

02
Fill Application Form

Visit our campus or contact HOD Dr. Parjanya Shukla on +91 76685 75695. Application forms available at the admissions office.

03
Submit Documents

Attach 10th & 12th marksheets, transfer certificate, character certificate, 4 passport photos, Aadhar card copy.

04
Entrance / Counselling

Attend AKTU/PCI counselling session. GPAT qualified students get direct admission to M.Pharm with scholarship benefits.

05
Fee Payment

Pay the semester fee at the accounts department. Flexible payment options and scholarship schemes available.

06
Get Your ID & Begin!

Collect your student ID, lab coat, and timetable. Your pharmacy journey at KGIP begins! 🎓

🔬
Pharmaceutical Lab
Fully equipped with instruments for practical drug analysis & synthesis
📚

🧪
Chemistry Lab
Organic, Inorganic & Analytical chemistry labs
🏥
Dispensing Pharmacy
Simulated hospital pharmacy for clinical training
🎓
Seminar Hall
Smart classroom with projector & audio-visual setup
🌿
Herbal Garden
In-campus medicinal plant garden for pharmacognosy
🏃
Sports Ground
Basketball court, cricket ground & indoor games
🍽️
Cafeteria
Hygienic canteen serving nutritious meals
🚌
Transport
College bus facility covering major city routes
🏠
Hostel
Separate boys & girls hostel with 24×7 security
📡
Wi-Fi Campus
High-speed internet across the entire campus

Student Clubs & Activities

Holistic development through co-curricular excellence

💊
Pharmacy Club

Drug awareness campaigns, quiz contests, model making & pharmacy week celebrations

🔬
Research Committee

Student-led research projects, poster presentations & journal reading sessions

🎨
Cultural Committee

Annual college fest, competitions, art exhibitions & cultural programmes

🏆
Sports Academy

Cricket, basketball, kabaddi & annual sports day events

🌿
Nature Club

Herbal garden maintenance, plantation drives & eco-awareness activities

🧠

📸
Media Club

🤝
NSS Unit

💰 Financial Support

Scholarships & Aid

We believe financial constraints should never stop a bright student

🥇
GPAT Merit Scholarship
Tuition Fee Waiver

Students qualifying GPAT are eligible for up to 100% tuition fee waiver for M.Pharm admission.

📊
UP Government Scholarship
As per UP Govt. norms

SC/ST/OBC students get government scholarship. Apply through the UP Scholarship portal online.

🏅
Academic Excellence Award
₹5,000 – ₹15,000

Top 3 rank holders of each semester receive cash prizes and merit certificates every year.

🌟
Sports Quota
Fee Concession

Students representing state/national level sports events are eligible for fee concessions.

👨‍👩‍👧
Sibling Discount
10% Fee Reduction

Second sibling enrolled at KGIP gets 10% tuition fee discount automatically.

📞
Need-Based Aid
Contact HOD

Special financial assistance for economically weaker students. Contact Dr. Parjanya Shukla directly.

⚖️ Safe Campus

Policies & Compliance

🚫
Anti-Ragging Policy

KGIP strictly follows UGC Anti-Ragging regulations. Zero tolerance. Helpline: 1800-180-5522

♀️
Women's Safety Cell

Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) under POSH Act. Safe, respectful environment for all female students.

📋
IQAC Cell

Internal Quality Assurance Cell monitors academic quality, research output & institutional improvement.

🌱
Grievance Cell

Student grievances addressed within 7 working days. Drop a complaint at the admin office or call HOD.

🔒
RTI Compliance

All information available under Right to Information Act 2005. Contact admin for RTI applications.

♿
Disability Support

KGIP is committed to inclusive education. Ramp access, special assistance & counselling available.

❓ Common Questions

FAQ

Candidates must have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Mathematics with minimum 45% marks (40% for reserved category). Admission through AKTU counselling.
KGIP is a private institution affiliated to Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow, and approved by PCI (Pharmacy Council of India) and AICTE.
Yes! Separate boys and girls hostel with 24×7 security, CCTV, Wi-Fi, and hygienic mess facilities are available on campus.
GPAT is the national level exam for M.Pharm admission. KGIP has a dedicated GPAT coaching cell with weekly mock tests, study material, and guidance from experienced faculty.
Yes, KGIP conducts regular on-campus and off-campus placement drives. Companies like Macleods, Torrent, INTAS, Merck, Hetero & many more visit for recruitment.
Call or WhatsApp Dr. Parjanya Shukla at +91 76685 75695, or join our Telegram channel @Krishnetwork for admission updates and form details.
Government scholarships for SC/ST/OBC through UP Scholarship portal, GPAT merit scholarship, academic excellence awards, and need-based financial assistance are available.
Yes! KGIP degrees are from AKTU (a government university) and PCI approved, making them valid for all government and private sector pharmaceutical jobs in India.
